title: AAR: Lead Management Countermeasures (V2.7)
scope: Lead management philosophy layer for coaching AI — each head coach now gets a lead management profile derived from existing attributes as a normalized blend of five countermeasure tendencies.

rationale.item: The Delta Yards system creates a structural tension between scoring and field position, but the coaching AI treated this as a single-strategy problem. A Chain Gang coach up by 15 played identically to a Ball Control coach up by 15.

delegation_events.decision: Make system bidirectional (leading AND trailing) because a Vault coach trailing by 14 still trusts the defense — it's a coaching identity, not a deficiency
delegation_events.quote: A Vault coach trailing by 14 still trusts the defense and grinds. That's a *coaching identity*, not a deficiency.

delegation_events.decision: Continuous sensitivity ramp instead of threshold to avoid behavioral cliffs
delegation_events.quote: Binary thresholds create cliffs in behavior. A coach who 'activates' at 7 points would play identically at 6 vs 0, then jump at 7.

delegation_events.decision: No new attributes — derive profile from existing personality slider space
delegation_events.quote: Adding a 'lead management tendency' slider would create redundancy with aggression/risk_tolerance/composure. Deriving the profile keeps the coaching card clean and produces emergent diversity from existing attributes.

delegation_events.decision: Layer on top of existing logic rather than replace it
delegation_events.quote: The countermeasure system adds a coaching-personality envelope *around* those decisions. A Vault coach still benefits from INT awareness when leading — they just *also* shift toward run-heavy play calling.

actions.description: Lead management profile: five tendencies (Avalanche/Thermostat/Vault/Counterpunch/Slow Drip) derived from existing personality sliders with classification/style bias bonuses
Continuous sensitivity ramp per coach based on reactivity score
Integration into 5 game engine decision points: play family weights, tempo, formation selection, kick mode entry, defensive yard suppression (Counterpunch)
ai_coach.py choose_defensive_call() updated with lead_management parameter

validation_claims.claim: Verified 5 extreme coaching archetype profiles. Sensitivity offset range spans 3.1 to 10.3 across the 5 test archetypes. No tendency is ever zero.
validation_claims.check_method: Generate coaches with extreme slider profiles and inspect their lead management tendency vectors

open_hooks: Pre-game narratives enabled: 'Coach Stone's Vault defense meets Coach Blitz's Avalanche offense'
Coaching identity visible as named lead management philosophy for all 200+ teams
section_headers_original: Why continuous ramp instead of threshold?
Why layer on top instead of replace?
unmapped_content: Files Changed: engine/coaching.py, engine/game_engine.py, engine/ai_coach.py. Sensitivity formula verbatim: reactivity = agg(0.30) + chaos(0.25) + inv_stubborn(0.25) + inv_composure(0.20); sensitivity_offset = max(1.0, 12.0 - reactivity * 0.11); sensitivity_range = max(6.0, 15.0 - reactivity * 0.09); ramp = clamp(0, 1, (|score_diff| - offset) / range). Five tendency derivation formulas (weighted sums of personality sliders). Five verified extreme coaching archetype profiles with tendency vectors.
parser_notes: Date from document header metadata: 2026-02-28. No non_actions or residual risks explicitly stated.
